text: Delete saved foods straight from library search results
Tap the NutriScan logo to jump back to the Scan screen
Tracker always shows the right day, and Trends uses your local date
Log Meal now confirms with 'Logged!' and the Tracker updates instantly
Pick multiple foods at once when building a meal template
Tab bar no longer floats mid-screen while typing
Fresh dark mode look — brighter accents, cleaner header
Header, banners and chat no longer blend together
Top bar stays visible in the AI chat tab
AI chat is now its own tab — no more floating window
Chat now opens as its own full screen
Pick your own time for each meal reminder — like 11:00 AM
Cleaner header — update alerts are now a banner
Settings: turn on meal reminders and weekly summaries, contact the developer, delete your account
Dark mode — toggle it from the top bar
Weekly summary notification on Sunday evenings
Pick which Google account to use when signing in
Email sign-in now uses a 6-digit code entered in the app
Daily meal reminders — turn them on in Settings
